block_03: Trade local currencies with handsome quotes on the weekend
block_06: We are delighted to announce that from now on, users from Asia can trade local currency pairs on OTC instruments.
block_15: An OTC deal is made directly between the broker and the trader without going public. That is why the quotes are unique to our platform.
block_16: The quotes are affected by the weekdays’ values, the number of options bought, and the investment amount.
block_17: How to trade in the OTC market
